message:
feat: tile header tmux copy, grouped action buttons, keyboard shortcuts (#72)

- Each tile header now shows full 'tmux attach -t <session>' with copy button
- Tile/attach/add buttons grouped together in tab bar
- Keyboard shortcuts: ⌘T (tile toggle), ⌘⇧L (attach tmux), ⌘⇧N (new terminal)
- Tile header tmux text adapts color to focus state (blue tint when focused)

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
